system.title: System
system.languageHint: Choose the language used by the interface and emails.
system.themeHint: Choose between light and dark themes.
system.changeEmailHint: Current email: {email}. A confirmation code will be sent to the new address.
system.changePasswordHint: Enter the current password and a new password. The current session will end after the change.

system.deleteAccountHint: This action deletes the account and ends all related sessions.

errors.VALIDATION_USERNAME_TOO_SHORT: Username must contain at least 3 characters.
errors.VALIDATION_PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must contain at least 8 characters.
errors.AUTH_EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Confirm your email before signing in.
errors.AUTH_EMAIL_IN_USE: This email is already in use.
errors.AUTH_USERNAME_IN_USE: This username is already in use.
errors.AUTH_INVALID_OR_EXPIRED_CODE: The code is invalid or expired.
errors.AUTH_SESSION_NOT_FOUND: The account session was not found.
errors.AUTH_INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN: Your session has expired. Sign in again.
errors.AUTH_SESSION_REVOKED: Your session has ended. Sign in again.
errors.AUTH_SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Sign in again.
errors.AUTH_CODE_LOCKED: Too many incorrect attempts. Request a new code.
errors.AUTH_CODE_RESEND_TOO_SOON: A code was already sent. Try again later.
errors.AUTH_EMAIL_CHANGE_NOT_FOUND: Email change request was not found.
errors.AVATAR_INVALID_IMAGE: The image could not be decoded.
errors.AVATAR_DIMENSIONS_TOO_LARGE: The image dimensions are too large.
errors.AVATAR_CONTENT_TYPE_REQUIRED: The image format could not be determined.
errors.AVATAR_UNSUPPORTED_TYPE: Use a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.
errors.AVATAR_TOO_LARGE: The image must be 5MB or smaller.
errors.AVATAR_SIGNATURE_MISMATCH: The image contents do not match its format.
errors.INFRASTRUCTURE_RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Try again later.
errors.SECURITY_CSRF_INVALID: The page session expired. Refresh the page.
errors.SECURITY_ORIGIN_INVALID: The request source is not allowed.
errors.SECURITY_TOKEN_INVALID: Your session is invalid. Sign in again.
errors.NETWORK_TIMEOUT: The service took too long to respond.
